name: Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A)
description: The financial intelligence layer of organizations responsible for planning, forecasting, and guiding strategic financial decisions.

tiles.name: Niches
tiles.description: FP&A institution types and market niches

institutions.name: Corporate HQ FP&A
institutions.description: Centralized FP&A teams responsible for consolidated budgets and enterprise-wide financial strategy.

functions.name: Global Budget Consolidation
functions.description: Aggregating financial plans across all business units into a unified corporate budget.

functions.name: Strategic Financial Planning
functions.description: Modeling long-term financial trajectories aligned with company strategy.

functions.name: Executive Performance Reporting
functions.description: Producing financial dashboards and board-level summaries.

functions.name: Capital Allocation Oversight
functions.description: Guiding investment decisions across divisions.

institutions.name: Business Unit (BU) Finance
institutions.description: Embedded finance teams working inside departments to manage their financial performance.

functions.name: Department P&L Management
functions.description: Monitoring revenue and cost performance of a specific business unit.

functions.name: Operational Budgeting
functions.description: Preparing departmental budgets aligned with operational plans.

functions.name: Cross-Functional Business Partnership
functions.description: Supporting department heads with financial insights.

functions.name: Cost Efficiency Analysis
functions.description: Identifying opportunities to optimize operational expenses.

institutions.name: Regional / Geographic Finance
institutions.description: Finance teams managing region-specific financial planning considering tax, FX, and market dynamics.

functions.name: Regional Financial Forecasting
functions.description: Developing financial projections tailored to regional markets.

functions.name: Currency Risk Management
functions.description: Analyzing exchange rate impacts on revenue and costs.

functions.name: Regional Tax Optimization
functions.description: Structuring operations to ensure tax efficiency.

functions.name: Market Performance Analysis
functions.description: Evaluating profitability across geographic markets.

institutions.name: FP&A Consulting / Outsourced FP&A
institutions.description: External consultants providing financial modeling and planning support to companies.

functions.name: Financial Model Development
functions.description: Building integrated financial models for corporate clients.

functions.name: Performance Improvement Advisory
functions.description: Helping firms optimize cost structures and profitability.

functions.name: Forecasting System Implementation
functions.description: Deploying FP&A tools and processes.

functions.name: Strategic Financial Advisory
functions.description: Supporting executive-level financial decisions.

institutions.name: Private Equity Portfolio FP&A
institutions.description: High-performance FP&A teams inside PE-owned companies focused on value creation and exit preparation.

functions.name: Value Creation Modeling
functions.description: Developing financial strategies to increase portfolio company value.

functions.name: Cash Flow Optimization
functions.description: Managing liquidity to support growth and investor expectations.

functions.name: Exit Readiness Planning
functions.description: Preparing financial reporting for IPO or acquisition.

functions.name: Operational Performance Tracking
functions.description: Monitoring KPIs tied to private equity investment theses.

tiles.name: Jobs
tiles.description: Career roles and positions in FP&A

tiles.name: Tasks
tiles.description: Key activities and responsibilities in FP&A
